key_risks: Semiconductor reversal after huge YTD gains (SMH +73% 6m) if AI sentiment cracks
Hot June CPI (July 14) reigniting rate fears and hurting long Treasuries
Healthcare momentum reversal after sharp 30d rally
Geopolitical re-escalation Iran/oil shock pressuring cyclicals
Weak July payrolls undermining industrials/cyclical thesis

portfolio.rationale: Strong recent leadership (+8% 30d), defensive with low beta, biotech strength, and earnings season catalyst supportive into July.
Flash PMI manufacturing at 59-month high (55.7) and output expansion support cyclical industrials into Q2 earnings.
Micron blowout with HBM demand exceeding supply through 2027 is a fresh sector catalyst; AI capex backdrop intact.
Broadening market participation; reduces mega-cap tech concentration risk while keeping equity beta near 1.
Hedge against growth scare/AI tech reversal; FOMC July 28-29 and softening employment in PMI could pull long yields lower.

portfolio_rationale: Balanced pro-cyclical tilt with defensive healthcare leadership and a semiconductor catalyst (Micron) sleeve, broadened via equal-weight S&P, with long Treasuries as a duration hedge into the July FOMC and payrolls window.
rationale_summary: Combines leading defensive sector (healthcare), cyclical industrials supported by PMI strength, semis riding fresh Micron HBM catalyst, equal-weight broadening, and TLT as macro hedge.
